name: global/header
description: Generic coverage test for global/header on the setup page. Collects every required method argument by walking the compose tree, synthesizes smart defaults from arg names, calls every method, resolves every public element, validates return types.
descriptionHtml: Generic coverage test for global/header on the setup page. Collects every required method argument by walking the compose tree, synthesizes smart defaults from arg names, calls every method, resolves every public element, validates return types.
